underlying_goal: Fix various UI/UX issues in a Flutter pet social app, implement a meaningful friendship system with rewards, and resolve Supabase security issues
friction_detail: Multiple issues: award_vip_xp RPC didn't exist, missing RLS UPDATE/DELETE policies on vip_friendships caused accept/decline to silently fail, and flutter run attempted in non-interactive terminal.
brief_summary: User worked through multiple Flutter app issues including UI fixes, implementing a friendship reward system (XP, profile counter, feed priority, radar badges), and Supabase security fixes, with most features implemented but some requiring additional debugging rounds.
